history.content:
<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor, while the goal is farther to the right but the path in that direction includes lava, so I should first move into the open space ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward with two lava cells directly ahead in the row above me, so moving forward would be deadly. The goal is visible farther ahead and to the right, but I need to avoid the lava first. Turning left will orient me toward the safe open space on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open floor is to my right, so I should turn right to face it and continue exploring safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cells directly in front of me are lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is visible ahead and to the right, but I need to avoid the lava first. Turning left will orient me toward the open path on the left side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open space is to my right, so I should turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cells directly ahead are lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The goal is visible to the right side of the corridor, and turning right should orient me toward a safer path toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible in the upper row of the local view, and the cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell. Moving forward is the best immediate step to get closer while avoiding the lava on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
